AddTagsToResource.name: AddTagsToResource
AddTagsToResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to an ElastiCache resource

AuthorizeCacheSecurityGroupIngress.name: AuthorizeCacheSecurityGroupIngress
AuthorizeCacheSecurityGroupIngress.description: Grants permission to authorize an EC2 security group on a ElastiCache security group

BatchApplyUpdateAction.name: BatchApplyUpdateAction
BatchApplyUpdateAction.description: Grants permission to apply ElastiCache service updates to sets of clusters and replication groups

BatchStopUpdateAction.name: BatchStopUpdateAction
BatchStopUpdateAction.description: Grants permission to stop ElastiCache service updates from being executed on a set of clusters

CompleteMigration.name: CompleteMigration
CompleteMigration.description: Grants permission to complete an online migration of data from hosted Redis on Amazon EC2 to ElastiCache

Connect.name: Connect
Connect.description: Grants permission to connect as a specified ElastiCache user to an ElastiCache Replication Group or ElastiCache serverless cache

CopyServerlessCacheSnapshot.name: CopyServerlessCacheSnapshot
CopyServerlessCacheSnapshot.description: Grants permission to make a copy of an existing serverless cache snapshot

CopySnapshot.name: CopySnapshot
CopySnapshot.description: Grants permission to make a copy of an existing snapshot

CreateCacheCluster.name: CreateCacheCluster
CreateCacheCluster.description: Grants permission to create a cache cluster

CreateCacheParameterGroup.name: CreateCacheParameterGroup
CreateCacheParameterGroup.description: Grants permission to create a parameter group

CreateCacheSecurityGroup.name: CreateCacheSecurityGroup
CreateCacheSecurityGroup.description: Grants permission to create a cache security group

CreateCacheSubnetGroup.name: CreateCacheSubnetGroup
CreateCacheSubnetGroup.description: Grants permission to create a cache subnet group

CreateGlobalReplicationGroup.name: CreateGlobalReplicationGroup
CreateGlobalReplicationGroup.description: Grants permission to create a global replication group

CreateReplicationGroup.name: CreateReplicationGroup
CreateReplicationGroup.description: Grants permission to create a replication group

CreateServerlessCache.name: CreateServerlessCache
CreateServerlessCache.description: Grants permission to create a serverless cache

CreateServerlessCacheSnapshot.name: CreateServerlessCacheSnapshot
CreateServerlessCacheSnapshot.description: Grants permission to create a copy of a serverless cache at a specific moment in time

CreateSnapshot.name: CreateSnapshot
CreateSnapshot.description: Grants permission to create a copy of an entire Redis cluster at a specific moment in time

CreateUser.name: CreateUser
CreateUser.description: Grants permission to create a user for Redis. Users are supported from Redis 6.0 onwards

CreateUserGroup.name: CreateUserGroup
CreateUserGroup.description: Grants permission to create a user group for Redis. Groups are supported from Redis 6.0 onwards

DecreaseNodeGroupsInGlobalReplicationGro.name: DecreaseNodeGroupsInGlobalReplicationGroup
DecreaseNodeGroupsInGlobalReplicationGro.description: Grants permission to decrease the number of node groups in global replication groups

DecreaseReplicaCount.name: DecreaseReplicaCount
DecreaseReplicaCount.description: Grants permission to decrease the number of replicas in a Redis (cluster mode disabled) replication group or the number of replica nodes in one or more node groups (shards) of a Redis (cluster mode enabled) replication group

DeleteCacheCluster.name: DeleteCacheCluster
DeleteCacheCluster.description: Grants permission to delete a previously provisioned cluster

DeleteCacheParameterGroup.name: DeleteCacheParameterGroup
DeleteCacheParameterGroup.description: Grants permission to delete the specified cache parameter group

DeleteCacheSecurityGroup.name: DeleteCacheSecurityGroup
DeleteCacheSecurityGroup.description: Grants permission to delete a cache security group

DeleteCacheSubnetGroup.name: DeleteCacheSubnetGroup
DeleteCacheSubnetGroup.description: Grants permission to delete a cache subnet group

DeleteGlobalReplicationGroup.name: DeleteGlobalReplicationGroup
DeleteGlobalReplicationGroup.description: Grants permission to delete an existing global replication group

DeleteReplicationGroup.name: DeleteReplicationGroup
DeleteReplicationGroup.description: Grants permission to delete an existing replication group

DeleteServerlessCache.name: DeleteServerlessCache
DeleteServerlessCache.description: Grants permission to delete a serverless cache

DeleteServerlessCacheSnapshot.name: DeleteServerlessCacheSnapshot
DeleteServerlessCacheSnapshot.description: Grants permission to delete a serverless cache snapshot

DeleteSnapshot.name: DeleteSnapshot
DeleteSnapshot.description: Grants permission to delete an existing snapshot

DeleteUser.name: DeleteUser
DeleteUser.description: Grants permission to delete an existing user and thus remove it from all user groups and replication groups where it was assigned

DeleteUserGroup.name: DeleteUserGroup
DeleteUserGroup.description: Grants permission to delete an existing user group

DescribeCacheClusters.name: DescribeCacheClusters
DescribeCacheClusters.description: Grants permission to list information about provisioned cache clusters

DescribeCacheEngineVersions.name: DescribeCacheEngineVersions
DescribeCacheEngineVersions.description: Grants permission to list available cache engines and their versions

DescribeCacheParameterGroups.name: DescribeCacheParameterGroups
DescribeCacheParameterGroups.description: Grants permission to list cache parameter group descriptions

DescribeCacheParameters.name: DescribeCacheParameters
DescribeCacheParameters.description: Grants permission to retrieve the detailed parameter list for a particular cache parameter group

DescribeCacheSecurityGroups.name: DescribeCacheSecurityGroups
DescribeCacheSecurityGroups.description: Grants permission to list cache security group descriptions

DescribeCacheSubnetGroups.name: DescribeCacheSubnetGroups
DescribeCacheSubnetGroups.description: Grants permission to list cache subnet group descriptions

DescribeEngineDefaultParameters.name: DescribeEngineDefaultParameters
DescribeEngineDefaultParameters.description: Grants permission to retrieve the default engine and system parameter information for the specified cache engine

DescribeEvents.name: DescribeEvents
DescribeEvents.description: Grants permission to list events related to clusters, cache security groups, and cache parameter groups

DescribeGlobalReplicationGroups.name: DescribeGlobalReplicationGroups
DescribeGlobalReplicationGroups.description: Grants permission to list information about global replication groups

DescribeReplicationGroups.name: DescribeReplicationGroups
DescribeReplicationGroups.description: Grants permission to list information about provisioned replication groups

DescribeReservedCacheNodes.name: DescribeReservedCacheNodes
DescribeReservedCacheNodes.description: Grants permission to list information about purchased reserved cache nodes

DescribeReservedCacheNodesOfferings.name: DescribeReservedCacheNodesOfferings
DescribeReservedCacheNodesOfferings.description: Grants permission to list available reserved cache node offerings

DescribeServerlessCacheSnapshots.name: DescribeServerlessCacheSnapshots
DescribeServerlessCacheSnapshots.description: Grants permission to list information about serverless cache snapshots

DescribeServerlessCaches.name: DescribeServerlessCaches
DescribeServerlessCaches.description: Grants permission to list serverless caches

DescribeServiceUpdates.name: DescribeServiceUpdates
DescribeServiceUpdates.description: Grants permission to list details of the service updates

DescribeSnapshots.name: DescribeSnapshots
DescribeSnapshots.description: Grants permission to list information about cluster or replication group snapshots

DescribeUpdateActions.name: DescribeUpdateActions
DescribeUpdateActions.description: Grants permission to list details of the update actions for a set of clusters or replication groups

DescribeUserGroups.name: DescribeUserGroups
DescribeUserGroups.description: Grants permission to list information about Redis user groups

DescribeUsers.name: DescribeUsers
DescribeUsers.description: Grants permission to list information about Redis users

DisassociateGlobalReplicationGroup.name: DisassociateGlobalReplicationGroup
DisassociateGlobalReplicationGroup.description: Grants permission to remove a secondary replication group from the global replication group

ExportServerlessCacheSnapshot.name: ExportServerlessCacheSnapshot
ExportServerlessCacheSnapshot.description: Grants permission to export a copy of a serverless cache at a specific moment in time to s3 bucket

FailoverGlobalReplicationGroup.name: FailoverGlobalReplicationGroup
FailoverGlobalReplicationGroup.description: Grants permission to failover the primary region to a selected secondary region of a global replication group

IncreaseNodeGroupsInGlobalReplicationGro.name: IncreaseNodeGroupsInGlobalReplicationGroup
IncreaseNodeGroupsInGlobalReplicationGro.description: Grants permission to increase the number of node groups in a global replication group

IncreaseReplicaCount.name: IncreaseReplicaCount
IncreaseReplicaCount.description: Grants permission to increase the number of replicas in a Redis (cluster mode disabled) replication group or the number of replica nodes in one or more node groups (shards) of a Redis (cluster mode enabled) replication group

InterruptClusterAzPower.name: InterruptClusterAzPower
InterruptClusterAzPower.description: Grants permission to test an AZ power interruption for an ElastiCache resource

ListAllowedNodeTypeModifications.name: ListAllowedNodeTypeModifications
ListAllowedNodeTypeModifications.description: Grants permission to list available node type that can be used to scale a particular Redis cluster or replication group

ListTagsForResource.name: ListTagsForResource
ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for an ElastiCache resource

ModifyCacheCluster.name: ModifyCacheCluster
ModifyCacheCluster.description: Grants permission to modify settings for a cluster

ModifyCacheParameterGroup.name: ModifyCacheParameterGroup
ModifyCacheParameterGroup.description: Grants permission to modify parameters of a cache parameter group

ModifyCacheSubnetGroup.name: ModifyCacheSubnetGroup
ModifyCacheSubnetGroup.description: Grants permission to modify an existing cache subnet group

ModifyGlobalReplicationGroup.name: ModifyGlobalReplicationGroup
ModifyGlobalReplicationGroup.description: Grants permission to modify settings for a global replication group

ModifyReplicationGroup.name: ModifyReplicationGroup
ModifyReplicationGroup.description: Grants permission to modify the settings for a replication group

ModifyReplicationGroupShardConfiguration.name: ModifyReplicationGroupShardConfiguration
ModifyReplicationGroupShardConfiguration.description: Grants permission to add shards, remove shards, or rebalance the keyspaces among existing shards of a replication group

ModifyServerlessCache.name: ModifyServerlessCache
ModifyServerlessCache.description: Grants permission to modify parameters for a serverless cache

ModifyUser.name: ModifyUser
ModifyUser.description: Grants permission to change Redis user password(s) and/or access string

ModifyUserGroup.name: ModifyUserGroup
ModifyUserGroup.description: Grants permission to change list of users that belong to the user group

PurchaseReservedCacheNodesOffering.name: PurchaseReservedCacheNodesOffering
PurchaseReservedCacheNodesOffering.description: Grants permission to purchase a reserved cache node offering

RebalanceSlotsInGlobalReplicationGroup.name: RebalanceSlotsInGlobalReplicationGroup
RebalanceSlotsInGlobalReplicationGroup.description: Grants permission to perform a key space rebalance operation to redistribute slots and ensure uniform key distribution across existing shards in a global replication group

RebootCacheCluster.name: RebootCacheCluster
RebootCacheCluster.description: Grants permission to reboot some, or all, of the cache nodes within a provisioned cache cluster or replication group (cluster mode disabled)

RemoveTagsFromResource.name: RemoveTagsFromResource
RemoveTagsFromResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a ElastiCache resource

ResetCacheParameterGroup.name: ResetCacheParameterGroup
ResetCacheParameterGroup.description: Grants permission to modify parameters of a cache parameter group back to their default values

RevokeCacheSecurityGroupIngress.name: RevokeCacheSecurityGroupIngress
RevokeCacheSecurityGroupIngress.description: Grants permission to remove an EC2 security group ingress from a ElastiCache security group

StartMigration.name: StartMigration
StartMigration.description: Grants permission to start a migration of data from hosted Redis on Amazon EC2 to ElastiCache for Redis

TestFailover.name: TestFailover
TestFailover.description: Grants permission to test automatic failover on a specified node group in a replication group

TestMigration.name: TestMigration
TestMigration.description: Grants permission to test a migration of data from hosted Redis on Amazon EC2 to ElastiCache for Redis

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters actions based on the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters actions based on the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters actions based on the tag keys that are passed in the request

elasticache:AtRestEncryptionEnabled.description: Filters access by the AtRestEncryptionEnabled parameter present in the request or default false value if parameter is not present

elasticache:AuthTokenEnabled.description: Filters access by the presence of non empty AuthToken parameter in the request

elasticache:AutomaticFailoverEnabled.description: Filters access by the AutomaticFailoverEnabled parameter in the request

elasticache:CacheNodeType.description: Filters access by the cacheNodeType parameter present in the request. This key can be used to restrict which cache node types can be used on cluster creation or scaling operations

elasticache:CacheParameterGroupName.description: Filters access by the CacheParameterGroupName parameter in the request

elasticache:ClusterModeEnabled.description: Filters access by the cluster mode parameter present in the request. Default value for single node group (shard) creations is false

elasticache:DataStorageUnit.description: Filters access by the CacheUsageLimits.DataStorage.Unit parameter in the CreateServerlessCache and ModifyServerlessCache request

elasticache:EngineType.description: Filters access by the engine type present in creation requests. For replication group creations, default engine 'redis' is used as key if parameter is not present

elasticache:EngineVersion.description: Filters access by the engineVersion parameter present in creation or cluster modification requests

elasticache:KmsKeyId.description: Filters access by the Key ID of the KMS key

elasticache:MaximumDataStorage.description: Filters access by the CacheUsageLimits.DataStorage.Maximum parameter in the CreateServerlessCache and ModifyServerlessCache request

elasticache:MaximumECPUPerSecond.description: Filters access by the CacheUsageLimits.ECPUPerSecond.Maximum parameter in the CreateServerlessCache and ModifyServerlessCache request

elasticache:MinimumDataStorage.description: Filters access by the CacheUsageLimits.DataStorage.Minimum parameter in the CreateServerlessCache and ModifyServerlessCache request

elasticache:MinimumECPUPerSecond.description: Filters access by the CacheUsageLimits.ECPUPerSecond.Minimum parameter in the CreateServerlessCache and ModifyServerlessCache request

elasticache:MultiAZEnabled.description: Filters access by the AZMode parameter, MultiAZEnabled parameter or the number of availability zones that the cluster or replication group can be placed in

elasticache:NumNodeGroups.description: Filters access by the NumNodeGroups or NodeGroupCount parameter specified in the request. This key can be used to restrict the number of node groups (shards) clusters can have after creation or scaling operations

elasticache:ReplicasPerNodeGroup.description: Filters access by the number of replicas per node group (shards) specified in creations or scaling requests

elasticache:SnapshotRetentionLimit.description: Filters access by the SnapshotRetentionLimit parameter in the request

elasticache:TransitEncryptionEnabled.description: Filters access by the TransitEncryptionEnabled parameter present in the request. For replication group creations, default value 'false' is used as key if parameter is not present

elasticache:UserAuthenticationMode.description: Filters access by the UserAuthenticationMode parameter in the request
